requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — CS/IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs entering Cambodia should meet the safety basis recognised by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia （ISC）, which adopts Cambodian Standards （CS） built on IEC and ASEAN references. IEC 62133-2 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems） is the internationally recognised cell-safety standard and the practical technical basis for ISC conformity or import inspection where lithium batteries are in scope. The standard covers abuse testing （overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge） and electrochemical performance limits. A test report from an ILAC/IEC-recognised laboratory to IEC 62133-2 is the documentation most likely to be accepted by the ISC conformity and import-inspection process.
summary.zh: 进入柬埔寨的便携式锂电芯及电池组，应满足柬埔寨标准局（ISC）认可的安全基础；ISC采用基于IEC及东盟参考制定的柬埔寨标准（CS）。IEC 62133-2（便携式应用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统）是国际公认的电芯安全标准，也是锂电池在适用范围内时ISC合格评定或进口检验的实际技术依据。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值。由ILAC/IEC认可实验室依据IEC 62133-2出具的检测报告，是最可能被ISC合格评定与进口检验流程接受的文件。
summary.zht: 進入柬埔寨的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，應滿足柬埔寨標準局（ISC）認可的安全基礎；ISC採用基於IEC及東盟參考制定的柬埔寨標準（CS）。IEC 62133-2（便攜式應用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統）是國際公認的電芯安全標準，也是鋰電池在適用範圍內時ISC合格評定或進口檢驗的實際技術依據。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值。由ILAC/IEC認可實驗室依據IEC 62133-2出具的檢測報告，是最可能被ISC合格評定與進口檢驗流程接受的文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems
Cambodian Standards （CS） adopted by ISC from IEC/ASEAN references
Law on Standards of Cambodia （ISC conformity / import inspection）

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment）. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 demonstrates Chinese domestic compliance but is not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62133-2 report recognised under the ISC conformity/import-inspection process.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告可证明中国国内符合性，但不会自动等同于在ISC合格评定/进口检验流程下被认可的IEC 62133-2报告。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告可證明中國國內符合性，但不會自動等同於在ISC合格評定/進口檢驗流程下被認可的IEC 62133-2報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment （SAC/SAMR）
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones （SAC）

gap.en: The substantive cell-safety expectation in Cambodia tracks IEC 62133-2, the international parent standard, applied through ISC conformity or import inspection. GB 31241 is derived from the same parent but is a national variant; an ISC reviewer or import inspector may require evidence on an IEC 62133-2 basis rather than the GB report alone. Key gaps: （1） test severity/acceptance deviations between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2; （2） preference for an ILAC-recognised （e.g. IECEE CB） test report and CB certificate to ease recognition; （3） product labelling and importer documentation must satisfy Cambodian customs and ISC inspection, which differ from Chinese domestic format.
gap.zh: 柬埔寨的实质电芯安全要求对接国际母标准IEC 62133-2，通过ISC合格评定或进口检验适用。GB 31241源自同一母标准，但属国家变体；ISC评审人员或进口检验官可能要求按IEC 62133-2基础提供证据，而非仅凭GB报告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在测试严苛程度/验收准则上的偏差；（2）倾向采用ILAC认可（如IECEE CB）的检测报告及CB证书以便于认可；（3）产品标签及进口商文件须满足柬埔寨海关与ISC检验要求，其格式与中国国内不同。
gap.zht: 柬埔寨的實質電芯安全要求對接國際母標準IEC 62133-2，通過ISC合格評定或進口檢驗適用。GB 31241源自同一母標準，但屬國家變體；ISC評審人員或進口檢驗官可能要求按IEC 62133-2基礎提供證據，而非僅憑GB報告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在測試嚴苛程度/驗收準則上的偏差；（2）傾向採用ILAC認可（如IECEE CB）的檢測報告及CB證書以便於認可；（3）產品標籤及進口商文件須滿足柬埔寨海關與ISC檢驗要求，其格式與中國國內不同。

mandatory_status.target: Applies where lithium batteries are in ISC scope — IEC 62133-2 （via adopted CS） is the recognised cell-safety basis for ISC conformity / import inspection; an ILAC/CB report is the practical expectation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodian market entry for portable lithium batteries is most reliably supported by IEC 62133-2 testing accepted under the ISC conformity/import-inspection framework, ideally via an ILAC-recognised （e.g. IECEE CB） report. Chinese GB 31241 certification is derived from the same IEC parent but is a national variant and does not by itself establish ISC acceptance, so exporters should prepare IEC 62133-2 evidence and confirm the current ISC route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 便携式锂电池进入柬埔寨市场，最可靠的支撑是在ISC合格评定/进口检验框架下被接受的IEC 62133-2测试，最好通过ILAC认可（如IECEE CB）报告。中国GB 31241认证源自同一IEC母标准，但属国家变体，本身不能确立ISC认可，因此出口商应准备IEC 62133-2证据，并在发货前确认现行ISC路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 便攜式鋰電池進入柬埔寨市場，最可靠的支撐是在ISC合格評定/進口檢驗框架下被接受的IEC 62133-2測試，最好通過ILAC認可（如IECEE CB）報告。中國GB 31241認證源自同一IEC母標準，但屬國家變體，本身不能確立ISC認可，因此出口商應準備IEC 62133-2證據，並在發貨前確認現行ISC路徑。
